variants: Cerys Yeung currently resides in Meadowveil Shire, having originally been born in Palmer's Crossing. In her role at Nebula Run Ventures, she contributed significantly to her field with the creation of the Fireglass Analysis Ledger, a recognized work within the industry. Her dedication and impact were further acknowledged when she received the Ironbark Medallion, honoring her accomplishments. Cerys continues to be a respected figure among her peers, driven by her innovative vision and commitment to advancement.
